Person [[PER-U-7782]] detected in frame — !!no matching access record within 60s window!!.`,vlmReasoning:`At **14:23:04**, a male individual in standard-issue tactical gear approaches Armoury-B from the east corridor without pausing at the badge reader. The subject exits the frame at **14:23:08** carrying the asset under his right arm and turns north toward the stairwell, away from the standard sign-out station. !!No verbal exchange or interaction with a second individual was observed.!! Duration of the check was **16 seconds**, compared to the required minimum of **45 seconds** for a full SOP-compliant screening. The subject does not appear to interact with any other individuals or objects in the space. Guard patrol schedule adjusted.`,activity:[{id:`act-0138-1`,type:`created`,timestamp:`2026-05-19T09:15:00Z`,timestampDisplay:`19 May 2026, 09:15`,elapsed:`0m`,title:`Case created from event EVT-2026-0519-005`,description:`Manually escalated by Jon during morning shift review.`},{id:`act-0138-2`,type:`note`,timestamp:`2026-05-19T09:40:00Z`,timestampDisplay:`19 May 2026, 09:40`,elapsed:`25m`,title:`Note added by Jon`,description:`Recurring pattern in Concourse-B near Gate B7. Guard patrol schedule adjusted — increased to every 20 minutes during 08:00–12:00.`}],createdAt:`2026-05-19T09:15:00Z`,createdAtDisplay:`19 May 2026, 09:15`,updatedAt:`2026-05-19T09:15:00Z`,updatedAtDisplay:`19 May 2026, 09:15`},{id:`CASE-2026-0135`,title:`Unauthorized Presence — Parking P1 Server Access`,severity:`critical`,status:`action-taken`,site:`astra`,siteDisplay:`Astra HQ`,assignedTo:{name:`Olivia`,id:`USR-004`},incidentIds:[`EVT-2026-0518-008`],notes:`Security team debriefed. Additional badge reader installed at P1 service elevator — entry now requires dual-factor authentication for restricted floor access. CCTV footage reviewed; no further suspicious activity in 48 hours. IT team reviewing server room access logs.`,activity:[{id:`act-0135-1`,type:`created`,timestamp:`2026-05-18T17:00:00Z`,timestampDisplay:`18 May 2026, 17:00`,elapsed:`0m`,title:`Case created from event EVT-2026-0518-008`,description:`Escalated during shift handover briefing by Ahmad.`},{id:`act-0135-2`,type:`acknowledged`,timestamp:`2026-05-18T17:12:00Z`,timestampDisplay:`18 May 2026, 17:12`,elapsed:`12m`,title:`Acknowledged by Olivia · within SLA`,description:`Acknowledge SLA: 12m / 15m target.`},{id:`act-0135-3`,type:`status`,timestamp:`2026-05-18T17:30:00Z`,timestampDisplay:`18 May 2026, 17:30`,elapsed:`30m`,title:`Status → In Review`,description:`CCTV footage pulled.
